🧠
AI-Driven QA Requirements Analyzer
A complete, production-grade QA automation framework built across 5 standalone HTML widgets. Each file is fully self-contained with dark mode support and zero external dependencies. Open any widget directly in your browser — no server, no npm, no build step required.
⚠ Anthropic API key required. Each widget prompts for your key on first use. Your key is stored in browser memory only and sent exclusively to api.anthropic.com. It is never logged or stored anywhere else. Get a key at console.anthropic.com.
1
Core Analyzer
The primary analysis engine. Ingest requirements via file upload or paste, run AI-powered NLP extraction, score quality against INVEST/SMART criteria, generate Gherkin BDD scenarios, build the RTM, detect ambiguities and conflicts, and export all artifacts.
IngestionNLP extractionQuality scoringGherkin genRTM builderAmbiguity detectionExport center
2
Advanced Analysis
Deep-dive analysis tools. Requirement detail drilldown with scores, change impact analyzer with word-level diff, domain knowledge base extraction, compliance checking across 6 frameworks, OWASP Top 10 mapping, interactive risk heatmap, and AI-powered requirement enhancement.
Req drilldownChange impactDomain KBComplianceOWASP mappingRisk heatmapAI enhanceJira / ADO
3
Generation & Operations
Full content generation suite. Structured test cases across all coverage levels, test data with SQL injection and XSS payloads, production automation scripts in 5 frameworks, defect hotspot prediction, analytics dashboard, pipeline monitor, and AI executive report generation.
Test case genTest data genScript genDefect predictorAnalyticsPipeline monitorExecutive report
4
Workspace & Visualization
Planning and collaboration tools. State machine visualizer, API contract tester for OpenAPI/Swagger specs, requirement dependency mapper with critical path detection, drag-and-drop kanban sprint board, QA effort estimator, version history, AI semantic global search, and team collaboration with inline comments.
State machineAPI contractDependency mapSprint boardEffort estimatorVersion historyGlobal searchCollaboration
5
AI Tools & System
Developer and operator tooling. Full CRUD prompt library with 6 built-in prompt templates, LLM playground with temperature control and run history, side-by-side model comparison with AI verdict, animated test runner console, p50/p95/p99 latency benchmark, webhook event log and tester, 8-step onboarding wizard, and complete feature tour.
Prompt libraryLLM playgroundModel comparisonTest runnerBenchmarkWebhook logsOnboardingFeature tour
Quick start: Click any widget card above to open it in a new tab. Enter your Anthropic API key when prompted. Widget 1 is the best starting point — paste some requirements and click Analyze.

Files in this package: index.html (this page) · widget1-core-analyzer.html · widget2-advanced-analysis.html · widget3-generation-operations.html · widget4-workspace.html · widget5-ai-tools.html · README.md

Built with Claude claude-sonnet-4-20250514  ·  5 widgets  ·  40+ AI-powered panels  ·  Zero external dependencies
